name: Xinyu Tian
cover_note_template: Hi, I'd love to be considered for {role}. I'm a bilingual performer based in the Bay Area with improv, comedy, and acting training. Thank you for your time.
bio: Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, Xinyu Tian is a bilingual performing artist specializing in live, unscripted comedy. She performs monthly with Lairen Improv in Mandarin and has a background spanning playback theatre, Improv Roulette shows with Now Theater, and Made Up Theatre showcases. She has trained in traditional acting technique at Ohlone College and De Anza College, with additional improv training at BATS Improv and Made Up Theater.
credits: Made Up Theater Showcase - host and actor - Bay Area - 2025
Made Up Theater Showcase - actor - Bay Area - 2026
Lairen Improv Monthly Performance - actor - San Jose - 2026
Open-Mic weekly - stand-up comedian - Bay Area - 2019

attributes.application_question_policy: Ask before answering questions about unlisted abilities, availability, wardrobe, comfort level, or special skills.
